_instructions: Options for bannerType: 'green', 'red', 'orange'. Set enabled to true to show the banner. Canada Day Sale runs June 15 - July 5; set enabled to false after July 5.
message: 🍁 Canada Day Sale: 10% OFF Storewide incl. Clearance + 10% Back in Rewards on everything else. Use code CanadaDay10 at checkout · Ends July 5
